description: Product Description We are the place where premium quality and great value go hand in hand. Every Fabulouz product is carefully built to deliver exceptional quality. Right from the materials used, to detailed quality checks, to thoughtful improvements, quality is at the core of everything we do. The product from the house of Fabulouz are made with genuine quality and passes all quality checks. Convenient Way to Organize No more searching inside the bag for a pound coin ever again. A convenient way to organize your key and trolley token in one go. Handy to Have with Your Keys Compatible with the majority of one pound trolleys, lockers etc. No need to go searching for that pound coin each time, keep your trolley token clipped on to a wallet, bag or purse and never be caught out again. No Worry for Trolley New shape one pound coin shopping trolley token keyring. Are you always looking for a coin or token to get a shopping trolley? No need to worry again! Our shopping trolley token is the perfect alternative. Great Gift These shopping trolley tokens are super practical in everyday life and is also ideal as a small gift for families or friends, which lasts longer and your friends/colleagues always remember you when they go shopping. Sturdy-Metal These trolley coins fit perfectly to new trolleys in supermarkets. Our shopping trolley token is made from sturdy metal like the new pound coins. Versatility Perfect novelty gift for you and your loved ones this Christmas. A strong metal token means it will last and comes complete with a good quality key ring to attach to your purse, keys, wallet or bag.
